ayahArabic: ٱقْتَرَبَ لِلنَّاسِ حِسَابُهُمْ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The time of] their account has approached for the people, while they are in heedlessness turning away.

targetTranslation: he comes to them (referring to the disbelievers receiving a new reminder)
ayahArabic: مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِم مُّحْدَثٍ إِلَّا ٱسْتَمَعُوهُ وَهُمْ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: No mention [i.e., revelation] comes to them anew from their Lord except that they listen to it while they are at play

ayahArabic: لَاهِيَةً قُلُوبُهُمْ وَأَسَرُّوا۟ ٱلنَّجْوَى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ هَلْ هٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ أَفَتَأْتُونَ ٱلسِّحْرَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: With their hearts distracted. And those who do wrong conceal their private conversation, [saying], "Is this [Prophet] except a human being like you? So would you approach magic while you are aware [of it]?"

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّى يَعْلَمُ ٱلْقَوْلَ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: He [the Prophet (ﷺ)] said, "My Lord knows whatever is said throughout the heaven and earth, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing."

ayahArabic: قَالَ رَبِّى يَعْلَمُ ٱلْقَوْلَ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ

ayahArabic: بَلْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَضْغٰثُ أَحْلٰمٍۭ بَلِ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ بَلْ هُوَ شَاعِرٌ فَلْيَأْتِنَا بِـَٔايَةٍ كَمَآ أُرْسِلَ ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they say, "[The revelation is but] a mixture of false dreams; rather, he has invented it; rather, he is a poet. So let him bring us a sign just as the previous [messengers] were sent [with miracles]."

targetTranslation: confused bundles (plural subject, owned by أَحْلٰمٍ)

ayahArabic: مَآ ءَامَنَتْ قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَآ أَفَهُمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Not a [single] city which We destroyed believed before them, so will they believe?

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you, [O Muḥammad], except men to whom We revealed [the message], so ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ

ayahArabic: وَمَا جَعَلْنٰهُمْ جَسَدًا لَّا يَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ خٰلِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We did not make them [i.e., the prophets] forms not eating food, nor were they immortal [on earth].

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ صَدَقْنٰهُمُ ٱلْوَعْدَ فَأَنجَيْنٰهُمْ وَمَن نَّشَآءُ وَأَهْلَكْنَا ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We fulfilled for them the promise, and We saved them and whom We willed and destroyed the transgressors.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ صَدَقْنٰهُمُ ٱلْوَعْدَ فَأَنجَيْنٰهُمْ وَمَن نَّشَآءُ وَأَهْلَكْنَا ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We fulfilled for them the promise, and We saved them and whom We willed and destroyed the transgressors.

targetTranslation: we sent down (connected to إِلَيْكُمْ - to you all)
ayahArabic: لَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ كِتٰبًا فِيهِ ذِكْرُكُمْ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: We have certainly sent down to you a Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] in which is your mention. Then will you not reason?

targetTranslation: a book (object of أَنزَلْنَآ - We sent down)

targetTranslation: we broke/destroyed (main verb of the sentence)
ayahArabic: وَكَمْ قَصَمْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ كَانَتْ ظَالِمَةً وَأَنشَأْنَا بَعْدَهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And how many a city which was unjust have We shattered and produced after it another people.

ayahArabic: وَكَمْ قَصَمْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ كَانَتْ ظَالِمَةً وَأَنشَأْنَا بَعْدَهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ

ayahArabic: فَلَمَّآ أَحَسُّوا۟ بَأْسَنَآ إِذَا هُم مِّنْهَا يَرْكُضُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when they [i.e., its inhabitants] perceived Our punishment, at once they fled from it.

ayahEnglish: And when they [i.e., its inhabitants] perceived Our punishment, at once they fled from it.

ayahArabic: لَا تَرْكُضُوا۟ وَٱرْجِعُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَآ أُتْرِفْتُمْ فِيهِ وَمَسٰكِنِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُسْـَٔلُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Some angels said], "Do not flee but return to where you were given luxury and to your homes - perhaps you will be questioned."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: فَمَا زَالَت تِّلْكَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ حَتَّىٰ جَعَلْنٰهُمْ حَصِيدًا خٰمِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And that declaration of theirs did not cease until We made them [as] a harvest [mowed down], extinguished [like a fire].

ayahEnglish: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play.

ayahEnglish: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play.

ayahEnglish: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play.

ayahArabic: لَوْ أَرَدْنَآ أَن نَّتَّخِذَ لَهْوًا لَّٱتَّخَذْنٰهُ مِن لَّدُنَّآ إِن كُنَّا فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: Had We intended to take a diversion, We could have taken it from [what is] with Us - if [indeed] We were to do so.

ayahArabic: بَلْ نَقْذِفُ بِٱلْحَقِّ عَلَى ٱلْبٰطِلِ فَيَدْمَغُهُۥ فَإِذَا هُوَ زَاهِقٌ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْوَيْلُ مِمَّا تَصِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, We dash the truth upon falsehood, and it destroys it, and thereupon it departs. And for you is destruction from that which you describe.

targetTranslation: whoever/who (refers to those in السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
ayahArabic: وَلَهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَنْ عِندَهُۥ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ عَنْ عِبَادَتِهِۦ وَلَا يَسْتَحْسِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: To Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And those near Him [i.e., the angels] are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, nor do they tire.

ayahEnglish: Had there been within them [i.e., the heavens and earth] gods besides Allāh, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allāh, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.

ayahArabic: لَا يُسْـَٔلُ عَمَّا يَفْعَلُ وَهُمْ يُسْـَٔلُونَ
ayahEnglish: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned.

targetTranslation: he does/is doing (what is not questioned about in لَا يُسْـَٔلُ)
ayahArabic: لَا يُسْـَٔلُ عَمَّا يَفْعَلُ وَهُمْ يُسْـَٔلُونَ

ayahArabic: لَا يُسْـَٔلُ عَمَّا يَفْعَلُ وَهُمْ يُسْـَٔلُونَ
ayahEnglish: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned.

targetTranslation: they took for themselves (takes ءَالِهَةً as object)
ayahArabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهٰنَكُمْ هٰذَا ذِكْرُ مَن مَّعِىَ وَذِكْرُ مَن قَبْلِى بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ ٱلْحَقَّ فَهُم مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or have they taken gods besides Him? Say, [O Muḥammad], "Produce your proof. This [Qur’ān] is the message for those with me and the message of those before me." But most of them do not know the truth, so they are turning away.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا نُوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدُونِ
ayahEnglish: And We sent not before you any messenger except We revealed to him that, "There is no deity except Me, so worship Me."

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا نُوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدُونِ

targetTranslation: he took for himself (subject of قَالُوا)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَلَدًا سُبْحٰنَهُۥ بَلْ عِبَادٌ مُّكْرَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَلَدًا سُبْحٰنَهُۥ بَلْ عِبَادٌ مُّكْرَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.

targetTranslation: His absolute perfection/glory (responding to their claim about الرَّحْمٰنُ)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَلَدًا سُبْحٰنَهُۥ بَلْ عِبَادٌ مُّكْرَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَلَدًا سُبْحٰنَهُۥ بَلْ عِبَادٌ مُّكْرَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.

ayahArabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَلَدًا سُبْحٰنَهُۥ بَلْ عِبَادٌ مُّكْرَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.

targetTranslation: they go ahead of him (negated by لَا)
ayahArabic: لَا يَسْبِقُونَهُۥ بِٱلْقَوْلِ وَهُم بِأَمْرِهِۦ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command.

ayahArabic: لَا يَسْبِقُونَهُۥ بِٱلْقَوْلِ وَهُم بِأَمْرِهِۦ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command.

targetTranslation: he knows (what is before them and after them)
ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يَشْفَعُونَ إِلَّا لِمَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ وَهُم مِّنْ خَشْيَتِهِۦ مُشْفِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they cannot intercede except on behalf of one whom He approves. And they, from fear of Him, are apprehensive.

targetTranslation: that which (connects يَعْلَمُ 'He knows' to what follows)

ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يَشْفَعُونَ إِلَّا لِمَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ وَهُم مِّنْ خَشْيَتِهِۦ مُشْفِقُونَ

targetTranslation: And have they not...? (connects to يَرَ - seen)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ كَانَتَا رَتْقًا فَفَتَقْنٰهُمَا وَجَعَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ حَىٍّ أَفَلَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have those who disbelieved not considered that the heavens and the earth were a joined entity, and then We separated them and made from water every living thing? Then will they not believe?

targetTranslation: mountains (because they are firmly fixed in the earth)
ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ رَوٰسِىَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِهِمْ وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا فِجَاجًا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We placed within the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with them, and We made therein [mountain] passes [as] roads that they might be guided.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ كُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ

ayahArabic: وَمَا جَعَلْنَا لِبَشَرٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ ٱلْخُلْدَ أَفَإِي۟ن مِّتَّ فَهُمُ ٱلْخٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We did not grant to any man before you eternity [on earth]; so if you die - would they be eternal?

ayahArabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَآئِقَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ وَنَبْلُوكُم بِٱلشَّرِّ وَٱلْخَيْرِ فِتْنَةً وَإِلَيْنَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.

ayahArabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَآئِقَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ وَنَبْلُوكُم بِٱلشَّرِّ وَٱلْخَيْرِ فِتْنَةً وَإِلَيْنَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.

ayahEnglish: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.

ayahEnglish: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.

ayahArabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَآئِقَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ وَنَبْلُوكُم بِٱلشَّرِّ وَٱلْخَيْرِ فِتْنَةً وَإِلَيْنَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا رَءَاكَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِن يَتَّخِذُونَكَ إِلَّا هُزُوًا أَهٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَذْكُرُ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ هُمْ كٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when those who disbelieve see you, [O Muḥammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], "Is this the one who mentions [i.e., insults] your gods?" And they are, at the mention of the Most Merciful, disbelievers.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا رَءَاكَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِن يَتَّخِذُونَكَ إِلَّا هُزُوًا أَهٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَذْكُرُ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ هُمْ كٰفِرُونَ

ayahArabic: خُلِقَ ٱلْإِنسٰنُ مِنْ عَجَلٍ سَأُو۟رِيكُمْ ءَايٰتِى فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
ayahEnglish: Man was created of haste [i.e., impatience]. I will show you My signs [i.e., vengeance], so do not impatiently urge Me.

targetTranslation: when (asking about time) (question in وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ - and they say, 'When?')
ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"

targetTranslation: you all were (asking about الْوَعْدُ - the promise)

ayahEnglish: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"

ayahArabic: لَوْ يَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ حِينَ لَا يَكُفُّونَ عَن وُجُوهِهِمُ ٱلنَّارَ وَلَا عَن ظُهُورِهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: If those who disbelieved but knew the time when they will not avert the Fire from their faces or from their backs and they will not be aided...

ayahArabic: بَلْ تَأْتِيهِم بَغْتَةً فَتَبْهَتُهُمْ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ رَدَّهَا وَلَا هُمْ يُنظَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Rather, it will come to them unexpectedly and bewilder them, and they will not be able to repel it, nor will they be reprieved.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱسْتُهْزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِٱلَّذِينَ سَخِرُوا۟ مِنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱسْتُهْزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِٱلَّذِينَ سَخِرُوا۟ مِنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱسْتُهْزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِٱلَّذِينَ سَخِرُوا۟ مِنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱسْتُهْزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِٱلَّذِينَ سَخِرُوا۟ مِنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱسْتُهْزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِٱلَّذِينَ سَخِرُوا۟ مِنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

ayahArabic: قُلْ مَن يَكْلَؤُكُم بِٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ مِنَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ بَلْ هُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.

ayahArabic: قُلْ مَن يَكْلَؤُكُم بِٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ مِنَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ بَلْ هُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.

targetTranslation: he guards/protects you all (referring to the disbelievers being addressed)

ayahEnglish: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.

targetTranslation: their Lord (referring to those who turn away from remembrance in this ayah)

ayahEnglish: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.

ayahArabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ ءَالِهَةٌ تَمْنَعُهُم مِّن دُونِنَا لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَلَا هُم مِّنَّا يُصْحَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us.

targetTranslation: she prevents them (referring to the false gods mentioned in آلِهَةٌ)

ayahEnglish: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us.

ayahArabic: بَلْ مَتَّعْنَا هٰٓؤُلَآءِ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ طَالَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْعُمُرُ أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَنَّا نَأْتِى ٱلْأَرْضَ نَنقُصُهَا مِنْ أَطْرَافِهَآ أَفَهُمُ ٱلْغٰلِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: But, [on the contrary], We have provided good things for these [disbelievers] and their fathers until life was prolonged for them. Then do they not see that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? Is it they who will overcome?

ayahArabic: بَلْ مَتَّعْنَا هٰٓؤُلَآءِ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ طَالَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْعُمُرُ أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَنَّا نَأْتِى ٱلْأَرْضَ نَنقُصُهَا مِنْ أَطْرَافِهَآ أَفَهُمُ ٱلْغٰلِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: But, [on the contrary], We have provided good things for these [disbelievers] and their fathers until life was prolonged for them. Then do they not see that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? Is it they who will overcome?

targetTranslation: so do they not? (connected to يَرَوْنَ - they see)

targetTranslation: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ before إِنَّمَآ أُنذِرُكُم)
ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أُنذِرُكُم بِٱلْوَحْىِ وَلَا يَسْمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا مَا يُنذَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned.

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أُنذِرُكُم بِٱلْوَحْىِ وَلَا يَسْمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا مَا يُنذَرُونَ

ayahEnglish: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned.

ayahEnglish: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned.

ayahArabic: وَلَئِن مَّسَّتْهُمْ نَفْحَةٌ مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّكَ لَيَقُولُنَّ يٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And if [as much as] a whiff of the punishment of your Lord should touch them, they would surely say, "O woe to us! Indeed, we have been wrongdoers."

targetTranslation: a single blast/touch (subject of مَسَّتْ - touched them)
ayahArabic: وَلَئِن مَّسَّتْهُمْ نَفْحَةٌ مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّكَ لَيَقُولُنَّ يٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And if [as much as] a whiff of the punishment of your Lord should touch them, they would surely say, "O woe to us! Indeed, we have been wrongdoers."

ayahEnglish: And if [as much as] a whiff of the punishment of your Lord should touch them, they would surely say, "O woe to us! Indeed, we have been wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: وَنَضَعُ ٱلْمَوٰزِينَ ٱلْقِسْطَ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فَلَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَإِن كَانَ مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِّنْ خَرْدَلٍ أَتَيْنَا بِهَا وَكَفَىٰ بِنَا حٰسِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We place the scales of justice for the Day of Resurrection, so no soul will be treated unjustly at all. And if there is [even] the weight of a mustard seed, We will bring it forth. And sufficient are We as accountant.

ayahArabic: وَنَضَعُ ٱلْمَوٰزِينَ ٱلْقِسْطَ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فَلَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَإِن كَانَ مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِّنْ خَرْدَلٍ أَتَيْنَا بِهَا وَكَفَىٰ بِنَا حٰسِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We place the scales of justice for the Day of Resurrection, so no soul will be treated unjustly at all. And if there is [even] the weight of a mustard seed, We will bring it forth. And sufficient are We as accountant.

ayahArabic: فَرَجَعُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ أَنتُمُ ٱلظَّالِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], "Indeed, you are the wrongdoers."

targetTranslation: they were turned upside down (referring to the idolaters in the story of Ibrahim)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ نُكِسُوا۟ عَلَىٰ رُءُوسِهِمْ لَقَدْ عَلِمْتَ مَا هٰٓؤُلَآءِ يَنطِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak!"

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ نُكِسُوا۟ عَلَىٰ رُءُوسِهِمْ لَقَدْ عَلِمْتَ مَا هٰٓؤُلَآءِ يَنطِقُونَ

ayahEnglish: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak!"

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَفَتَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُكُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يَضُرُّكُمْ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Then do you worship instead of Allāh that which does not benefit you at all or harm you?

ayahArabic: قُلْنَا يٰنَارُ كُونِى بَرْدًا وَسَلٰمًا عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرٰهِيمَ
ayahEnglish: We [i.e., Allāh] said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."

ayahEnglish: We [i.e., Allāh] said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."

ayahEnglish: We [i.e., Allāh] said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."

targetTranslation: Ibrahim (Abraham) - as the object being addressed
ayahArabic: قُلْنَا يٰنَارُ كُونِى بَرْدًا وَسَلٰمًا عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرٰهِيمَ
ayahEnglish: We [i.e., Allāh] said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."

targetTranslation: a plot (object of أَرَادُوا - they wanted)
ayahArabic: وَأَرَادُوا۟ بِهِۦ كَيْدًا فَجَعَلْنٰهُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they intended for him a plan [i.e., harm], but We made them the greatest losers.

ayahArabic: وَنَجَّيْنٰهُ وَلُوطًا إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا لِلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds [i.e., peoples].

ayahArabic: وَنَجَّيْنٰهُ وَلُوطًا إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا لِلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds [i.e., peoples].

targetTranslation: Isaac (as direct object of وَهَبْنَا/we granted)

ayahEnglish: And We gave him Isaac and Jacob in addition, and all [of them] We made righteous.

targetTranslation: as an extra gift (object of وَهَبْنَا - we granted)

targetTranslation: leaders (as the object of جَعَلْنٰهُمْ - we made them)
ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنٰهُمْ أَئِمَّةً يَهْدُونَ بِأَمْرِنَا وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِمْ فِعْلَ ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَإِقَامَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَإِيتَآءَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا عٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakāh; and they were worshippers of Us.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنٰهُمْ أَئِمَّةً يَهْدُونَ بِأَمْرِنَا وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِمْ فِعْلَ ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَإِقَامَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَإِيتَآءَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا عٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakāh; and they were worshippers of Us.

ayahArabic: وَلُوطًا ءَاتَيْنٰهُ حُكْمًا وَعِلْمًا وَنَجَّيْنٰهُ مِنَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ ٱلَّتِى كَانَت تَّعْمَلُ ٱلْخَبٰٓئِثَ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمَ سَوْءٍ فٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to Lot We gave judgement and knowledge, and We saved him from the city that was committing wicked deeds. Indeed, they were a people of evil, defiantly disobedient.

ayahArabic: وَلُوطًا ءَاتَيْنٰهُ حُكْمًا وَعِلْمًا وَنَجَّيْنٰهُ مِنَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ ٱلَّتِى كَانَت تَّعْمَلُ ٱلْخَبٰٓئِثَ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمَ سَوْءٍ فٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to Lot We gave judgement and knowledge, and We saved him from the city that was committing wicked deeds. Indeed, they were a people of evil, defiantly disobedient.

ayahArabic: وَأَدْخَلْنٰهُ فِى رَحْمَتِنَآ إِنَّهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We admitted him into Our mercy. Indeed, he was of the righteous.

ayahArabic: وَنُوحًا إِذْ نَادَىٰ مِن قَبْلُ فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ فَنَجَّيْنٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Noah, when he called [to Allāh] before [that time], so We responded to him and saved him and his family from the great affliction [i.e., the flood].

ayahArabic: وَنُوحًا إِذْ نَادَىٰ مِن قَبْلُ فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ فَنَجَّيْنٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Noah, when he called [to Allāh] before [that time], so We responded to him and saved him and his family from the great affliction [i.e., the flood].

ayahArabic: وَنُوحًا إِذْ نَادَىٰ مِن قَبْلُ فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ فَنَجَّيْنٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Noah, when he called [to Allāh] before [that time], so We responded to him and saved him and his family from the great affliction [i.e., the flood].

ayahArabic: وَنَصَرْنٰهُ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمَ سَوْءٍ فَأَغْرَقْنٰهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We aided [i.e., saved] him from the people who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a people of evil, so We drowned them, all together.

targetTranslation: they denied/rejected intensely (the signs/verses mentioned in بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ)

targetTranslation: when (in the past, referring to يَحْكُمَانِ)
ayahArabic: وَدَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمٰنَ إِذْ يَحْكُمَانِ فِى ٱلْحَرْثِ إِذْ نَفَشَتْ فِيهِ غَنَمُ ٱلْقَوْمِ وَكُنَّا لِحُكْمِهِمْ شٰهِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] David and Solomon, when they judged concerning the field - when the sheep of a people overran it [at night], and We were witness to their judgement.

targetTranslation: Solomon (the one who فَفَهَّمْنٰهَا/We gave understanding to)
ayahArabic: فَفَهَّمْنٰهَا سُلَيْمٰنَ وَكُلًّا ءَاتَيْنَا حُكْمًا وَعِلْمًا وَسَخَّرْنَا مَعَ دَاوُۥدَ ٱلْجِبَالَ يُسَبِّحْنَ وَٱلطَّيْرَ وَكُنَّا فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We gave understanding of it [i.e., the case] to Solomon, and to each [of them] We gave judgement and knowledge. And We subjected the mountains to exalt [Us], along with David and [also] the birds. And We were doing [that].

ayahArabic: فَفَهَّمْنٰهَا سُلَيْمٰنَ وَكُلًّا ءَاتَيْنَا حُكْمًا وَعِلْمًا وَسَخَّرْنَا مَعَ دَاوُۥدَ ٱلْجِبَالَ يُسَبِّحْنَ وَٱلطَّيْرَ وَكُنَّا فٰعِلِينَ

ayahArabic: وَعَلَّمْنٰهُ صَنْعَةَ لَبُوسٍ لَّكُمْ لِتُحْصِنَكُم مِّنۢ بَأْسِكُمْ فَهَلْ أَنتُمْ شٰكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We taught him the fashioning of coats of armor to protect you from your [enemy in] battle. So will you then be grateful?

ayahArabic: وَعَلَّمْنٰهُ صَنْعَةَ لَبُوسٍ لَّكُمْ لِتُحْصِنَكُم مِّنۢ بَأْسِكُمْ فَهَلْ أَنتُمْ شٰكِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We taught him the fashioning of coats of armor to protect you from your [enemy in] battle. So will you then be grateful?

ayahArabic: وَلِسُلَيْمٰنَ ٱلرِّيحَ عَاصِفَةً تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا وَكُنَّا بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَلِسُلَيْمٰنَ ٱلرِّيحَ عَاصِفَةً تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا وَكُنَّا بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing.

targetTranslation: ones who know deeply (plural, in object form)

ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلشَّيٰطِينِ مَن يَغُوصُونَ لَهُۥ وَيَعْمَلُونَ عَمَلًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَكُنَّا لَهُمْ حٰفِظِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of the devils [i.e., jinn] were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian.

targetTranslation: they dive deep (referring to some of the devils/شياطين mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلشَّيٰطِينِ مَن يَغُوصُونَ لَهُۥ وَيَعْمَلُونَ عَمَلًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَكُنَّا لَهُمْ حٰفِظِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of the devils [i.e., jinn] were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian.

ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلشَّيٰطِينِ مَن يَغُوصُونَ لَهُۥ وَيَعْمَلُونَ عَمَلًا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ وَكُنَّا لَهُمْ حٰفِظِينَ

ayahArabic: وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful."

ayahArabic: وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful."

targetTranslation: his Lord (the one being called out to)
ayahArabic: وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful."

ayahArabic: وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful."

ayahArabic: وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful."

ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ فَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِۦ مِن ضُرٍّ وَءَاتَيْنٰهُ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْعٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We responded to him and removed what afflicted him of adversity. And We gave him [back] his family and the like thereof with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for the worshippers [of Allāh].

ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ فَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِۦ مِن ضُرٍّ وَءَاتَيْنٰهُ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْعٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We responded to him and removed what afflicted him of adversity. And We gave him [back] his family and the like thereof with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for the worshippers [of Allāh].

ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ فَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِۦ مِن ضُرٍّ وَءَاتَيْنٰهُ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْعٰبِدِينَ

ayahEnglish: So We responded to him and removed what afflicted him of adversity. And We gave him [back] his family and the like thereof with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for the worshippers [of Allāh].

ayahArabic: وَإِسْمٰعِيلَ وَإِدْرِيسَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ كُلٌّ مِّنَ ٱلصَّابِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Ishmael and Idrees and Dhul-Kifl; all were of the patient.

ayahArabic: وَأَدْخَلْنٰهُمْ فِى رَحْمَتِنَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We admitted them into Our mercy. Indeed, they were of the righteous.

ayahArabic: وَذَا ٱلنُّونِ إِذ ذَّهَبَ مُغٰضِبًا فَظَنَّ أَن لَّن نَّقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ فَنَادَىٰ فِى ٱلظُّلُمٰتِ أَن لَّآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنتَ سُبْحٰنَكَ إِنِّى كُنتُ مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] the man of the fish [i.e., Jonah], when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him. And he called out within the darknesses, "There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: وَذَا ٱلنُّونِ إِذ ذَّهَبَ مُغٰضِبًا فَظَنَّ أَن لَّن نَّقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ فَنَادَىٰ فِى ٱلظُّلُمٰتِ أَن لَّآ إِلٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنتَ سُبْحٰنَكَ إِنِّى كُنتُ مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ

ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ وَنَجَّيْنٰهُ مِنَ ٱلْغَمِّ وَكَذٰلِكَ نُۨجِى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We responded to him and saved him from the distress. And thus do We save the believers.

ayahArabic: وَزَكَرِيَّآ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِى فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْوٰرِثِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors."

ayahArabic: وَزَكَرِيَّآ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِى فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْوٰرِثِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors."

ayahEnglish: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors."

ayahArabic: وَزَكَرِيَّآ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِى فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْوٰرِثِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors."

ayahArabic: وَزَكَرِيَّآ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِى فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْوٰرِثِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors."

targetTranslation: he lives (name given to زَكَرِيَّا's son)
ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ وَأَصْلَحْنَا لَهُۥ زَوْجَهُۥٓ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يُسٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَيَدْعُونَنَا رَغَبًا وَرَهَبًا وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا خٰشِعِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We responded to him, and We gave to him John, and amended for him his wife. Indeed, they used to hasten to good deeds and supplicate Us in hope and fear, and they were to Us humbly submissive.

ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ وَأَصْلَحْنَا لَهُۥ زَوْجَهُۥٓ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يُسٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَيَدْعُونَنَا رَغَبًا وَرَهَبًا وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا خٰشِعِينَ
ayahEnglish: So We responded to him, and We gave to him John, and amended for him his wife. Indeed, they used to hasten to good deeds and supplicate Us in hope and fear, and they were to Us humbly submissive.

ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ وَأَصْلَحْنَا لَهُۥ زَوْجَهُۥٓ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يُسٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَيَدْعُونَنَا رَغَبًا وَرَهَبًا وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا خٰشِعِينَ

targetTranslation: they rush eagerly (in الخَيْرٰتِ - good deeds)

targetTranslation: in desire, eagerly (describing how they call upon Allah)
ayahArabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ وَأَصْلَحْنَا لَهُۥ زَوْجَهُۥٓ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يُسٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرٰتِ وَيَدْعُونَنَا رَغَبًا وَرَهَبًا وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا خٰشِعِينَ

ayahEnglish: So We responded to him, and We gave to him John, and amended for him his wife. Indeed, they used to hasten to good deeds and supplicate Us in hope and fear, and they were to Us humbly submissive.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّتِىٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهَا مِن رُّوحِنَا وَجَعَلْنٰهَا وَٱبْنَهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] the one who guarded her chastity [i.e., Mary], so We blew into her [garment] through Our angel [i.e., Gabriel], and We made her and her son a sign for the worlds.

targetTranslation: her private part (object of أَحْصَنَتْ - she guarded)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّتِىٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهَا مِن رُّوحِنَا وَجَعَلْنٰهَا وَٱبْنَهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] the one who guarded her chastity [i.e., Mary], so We blew into her [garment] through Our angel [i.e., Gabriel], and We made her and her son a sign for the worlds.

targetTranslation: Our spirit (that We breathed into her)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّتِىٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهَا مِن رُّوحِنَا وَجَعَلْنٰهَا وَٱبْنَهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] the one who guarded her chastity [i.e., Mary], so We blew into her [garment] through Our angel [i.e., Gabriel], and We made her and her son a sign for the worlds.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّتِىٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهَا مِن رُّوحِنَا وَجَعَلْنٰهَا وَٱبْنَهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] the one who guarded her chastity [i.e., Mary], so We blew into her [garment] through Our angel [i.e., Gabriel], and We made her and her son a sign for the worlds.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُونِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُونِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُونِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ هٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُونِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me.

targetTranslation: their matter/affair (object of وَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ - they divided)
ayahArabic: وَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ كُلٌّ إِلَيْنَا رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [yet] they divided their affair [i.e., that of their religion] among themselves, [but] all to Us will return.

targetTranslation: between them (referring to the divided matters in أَمْرَهُم)
ayahArabic: وَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ كُلٌّ إِلَيْنَا رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [yet] they divided their affair [i.e., that of their religion] among themselves, [but] all to Us will return.

ayahArabic: وَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ كُلٌّ إِلَيْنَا رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [yet] they divided their affair [i.e., that of their religion] among themselves, [but] all to Us will return.

ayahArabic: وَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ كُلٌّ إِلَيْنَا رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [yet] they divided their affair [i.e., that of their religion] among themselves, [but] all to Us will return.

ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا كُفْرَانَ لِسَعْيِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ كٰتِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does righteous deeds while he is a believer - no denial will there be for his effort, and indeed We [i.e., Our angels], of it, are recorders.

targetTranslation: a believer/one who trusts (subject of وَهُوَ)
ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا كُفْرَانَ لِسَعْيِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ كٰتِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does righteous deeds while he is a believer - no denial will there be for his effort, and indeed We [i.e., Our angels], of it, are recorders.

ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا كُفْرَانَ لِسَعْيِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ كٰتِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does righteous deeds while he is a believer - no denial will there be for his effort, and indeed We [i.e., Our angels], of it, are recorders.

ayahArabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا كُفْرَانَ لِسَعْيِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ كٰتِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: So whoever does righteous deeds while he is a believer - no denial will there be for his effort, and indeed We [i.e., Our angels], of it, are recorders.

ayahArabic: وَحَرٰمٌ عَلَىٰ قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَآ أَنَّهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is prohibited to [the people of] a city which We have destroyed that they will [ever] return

targetTranslation: we destroyed it (referring to قَرْيَةٍ - a town)
ayahArabic: وَحَرٰمٌ عَلَىٰ قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَآ أَنَّهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is prohibited to [the people of] a city which We have destroyed that they will [ever] return

ayahArabic: وَحَرٰمٌ عَلَىٰ قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَآ أَنَّهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is prohibited to [the people of] a city which We have destroyed that they will [ever] return

targetTranslation: when (shows something that will happen in the future)
ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فُتِحَتْ يَأْجُوجُ وَمَأْجُوجُ وَهُم مِّن كُلِّ حَدَبٍ يَنسِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Until when [the dam of] Gog and Magog has been opened and they, from every elevation, descend

targetTranslation: she/it (feminine) (referring to أَبْصٰرُ/eyes in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَٱقْتَرَبَ ٱلْوَعْدُ ٱلْحَقُّ فَإِذَا هِىَ شٰخِصَةٌ أَبْصٰرُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يٰوَيْلَنَا قَدْ كُنَّا فِى غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هٰذَا بَلْ كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [when] the true promise [i.e., the resurrection] has approached; then suddenly the eyes of those who disbelieved will be staring [in horror, while they say], "O woe to us; we had been unmindful of this; rather, we were wrongdoers."

ayahEnglish: And [when] the true promise [i.e., the resurrection] has approached; then suddenly the eyes of those who disbelieved will be staring [in horror, while they say], "O woe to us; we had been unmindful of this; rather, we were wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: إِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ حَصَبُ جَهَنَّمَ أَنتُمْ لَهَا وٰرِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, you [disbelievers] and what you worship other than Allāh are the firewood of Hell. You will be coming to [enter] it.

ayahArabic: إِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ حَصَبُ جَهَنَّمَ أَنتُمْ لَهَا وٰرِدُونَ

ayahArabic: إِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ حَصَبُ جَهَنَّمَ أَنتُمْ لَهَا وٰرِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, you [disbelievers] and what you worship other than Allāh are the firewood of Hell. You will be coming to [enter] it.

ayahArabic: لَوْ كَانَ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ ءَالِهَةً مَّا وَرَدُوهَا وَكُلٌّ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Had these [false deities] been [actual] gods, they would not have come to it, but all are eternal therein.

ayahEnglish: Had these [false deities] been [actual] gods, they would not have come to it, but all are eternal therein.

targetTranslation: a heavy breathing sound (of the people in Hell)
ayahArabic: لَهُمْ فِيهَا زَفِيرٌ وَهُمْ فِيهَا لَا يَسْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: For them therein is heavy sighing, and they therein will not hear.

targetTranslation: those who - relative pronoun for plural
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَقَتْ لَهُم مِّنَّا ٱلْحُسْنَىٰٓ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ عَنْهَا مُبْعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those for whom the best [reward] has preceded from Us - they are from it far removed.

targetTranslation: they hear (referring to the disbelievers in Hell)
ayahArabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ حَسِيسَهَا وَهُمْ فِى مَا ٱشْتَهَتْ أَنفُسُهُمْ خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: They will not hear its sound, while they are, in that which their souls desire, abiding eternally.

ayahArabic: لَا يَحْزُنُهُمُ ٱلْفَزَعُ ٱلْأَكْبَرُ وَتَتَلَقَّىٰهُمُ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ هٰذَا يَوْمُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: They will not be grieved by the greatest terror, and the angels will meet them, [saying], "This is your Day which you have been promised" -

ayahEnglish: They will not be grieved by the greatest terror, and the angels will meet them, [saying], "This is your Day which you have been promised" -

targetTranslation: on the day (object of نَطْوِى - we will fold)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَ نَطْوِى ٱلسَّمَآءَ كَطَىِّ ٱلسِّجِلِّ لِلْكُتُبِ كَمَا بَدَأْنَآ أَوَّلَ خَلْقٍ نُّعِيدُهُۥ وَعْدًا عَلَيْنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ نَطْوِى ٱلسَّمَآءَ كَطَىِّ ٱلسِّجِلِّ لِلْكُتُبِ كَمَا بَدَأْنَآ أَوَّلَ خَلْقٍ نُّعِيدُهُۥ وَعْدًا عَلَيْنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it.

ayahEnglish: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it.

targetTranslation: we will return/bring it back (with emphasis)

ayahEnglish: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَ نَطْوِى ٱلسَّمَآءَ كَطَىِّ ٱلسِّجِلِّ لِلْكُتُبِ كَمَا بَدَأْنَآ أَوَّلَ خَلْقٍ نُّعِيدُهُۥ وَعْدًا عَلَيْنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا فٰعِلِينَ
ayahEnglish: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ كَتَبْنَا فِى ٱلزَّبُورِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ٱلذِّكْرِ أَنَّ ٱلْأَرْضَ يَرِثُهَا عِبَادِىَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ كَتَبْنَا فِى ٱلزَّبُورِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ٱلذِّكْرِ أَنَّ ٱلْأَرْضَ يَرِثُهَا عِبَادِىَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants.

targetTranslation: he inherits it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ كَتَبْنَا فِى ٱلزَّبُورِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ٱلذِّكْرِ أَنَّ ٱلْأَرْضَ يَرِثُهَا عِبَادِىَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants.

targetTranslation: my servants (who will inherit the earth)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ كَتَبْنَا فِى ٱلزَّبُورِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ٱلذِّكْرِ أَنَّ ٱلْأَرْضَ يَرِثُهَا عِبَادِىَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ فِى هٰذَا لَبَلٰغًا لِّقَوْمٍ عٰبِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, in this [Qur’ān] is notification for a worshipping people.

targetTranslation: we sent you (object of وَمَآ - and not)
ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنٰكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةً لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], except as a mercy to the worlds.

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنٰكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةً لِّلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], except as a mercy to the worlds.

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَهَلْ أَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "It is only revealed to me that your god is but one God; so will you be Muslims [in submission to Him]?"

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَهَلْ أَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَهَلْ أَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "It is only revealed to me that your god is but one God; so will you be Muslims [in submission to Him]?"

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَهَلْ أَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "It is only revealed to me that your god is but one God; so will you be Muslims [in submission to Him]?"

targetTranslation: those who submit/surrender (to Allah) (answering: فَهَلْ أَنتُم - 'then are you?')
ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلٰهُكُمْ إِلٰهٌ وٰحِدٌ فَهَلْ أَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "It is only revealed to me that your god is but one God; so will you be Muslims [in submission to Him]?"

targetTranslation: they turned themselves away (from the truth)
ayahArabic: فَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَقُلْ ءَاذَنتُكُمْ عَلَىٰ سَوَآءٍ وَإِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ أَم بَعِيدٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But if they turn away, then say, "I have announced to [all of] you equally. And I know not whether near or far is that which you are promised.

ayahArabic: فَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَقُلْ ءَاذَنتُكُمْ عَلَىٰ سَوَآءٍ وَإِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ أَم بَعِيدٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But if they turn away, then say, "I have announced to [all of] you equally. And I know not whether near or far is that which you are promised.

targetTranslation: equally (describing how the announcement in ءَاذَنتُكُمْ was made)
ayahArabic: فَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَقُلْ ءَاذَنتُكُمْ عَلَىٰ سَوَآءٍ وَإِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ أَم بَعِيدٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ

ayahEnglish: But if they turn away, then say, "I have announced to [all of] you equally. And I know not whether near or far is that which you are promised.

targetTranslation: far away (referring to something not specified yet)

ayahEnglish: But if they turn away, then say, "I have announced to [all of] you equally. And I know not whether near or far is that which you are promised.

targetTranslation: he knows (what is said openly in ٱلْجَهْرَ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَكْتُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, He knows what is declared of speech, and He knows what you conceal.

ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَكْتُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, He knows what is declared of speech, and He knows what you conceal.

targetTranslation: you (all) hide (something secretly) (subject of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَكْتُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, He knows what is declared of speech, and He knows what you conceal.

targetTranslation: I know (in response to وَإِنْ - and if)
ayahArabic: وَإِنْ أَدْرِى لَعَلَّهُۥ فِتْنَةٌ لَّكُمْ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And I know not; perhaps it is a trial for you and enjoyment for a time."

ayahArabic: وَإِنْ أَدْرِى لَعَلَّهُۥ فِتْنَةٌ لَّكُمْ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And I know not; perhaps it is a trial for you and enjoyment for a time."

targetTranslation: a time, a period (after إِلَىٰ meaning 'until')
ayahArabic: وَإِنْ أَدْرِى لَعَلَّهُۥ فِتْنَةٌ لَّكُمْ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And I know not; perhaps it is a trial for you and enjoyment for a time."

ayahArabic: قٰلَ رَبِّ ٱحْكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَرَبُّنَا ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ ٱلْمُسْتَعَانُ عَلَىٰ مَا تَصِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: [The Prophet (ﷺ)] has said, "My Lord, judge [between us] in truth. And our Lord is the Most Merciful, the one whose help is sought against that which you describe."

ayahArabic: قٰلَ رَبِّ ٱحْكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَرَبُّنَا ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ ٱلْمُسْتَعَانُ عَلَىٰ مَا تَصِفُونَ
